payload.answer: I found a conflict with existing memory. I did not store the new fact because 'Sara is my daughter' conflicts with 'Sara is my niece' if they refer to the same person. Please clarify whether this is a different Sara, or which relationship is correct.

entity_resolution.reason: The name 'Sara' may refer to the same person or to different people. If it is the same Sara, 'my daughter' and 'my niece' are in direct conflict.

details: Potential entity collision on the name 'Sara'.
Relationship conflict detected between existing and new information.

repair_options: Clarify whether this is the same Sara or a different Sara.
